ground_truth: Fig. 3. Performance comparision of the GPU-optimized version on various backends. Performance measurements have been performed both on an Nvidia GPU and a Nehalem-EP socket with eight cores. The RapidMind version is compared to a CUDA version based on cuBLAS and an MKL implementation of the dense matrix-matrix multiplication. Performance measurements are based on double-precision arithmetic.
